caption: The video appears to be a presentation or webinar focused on housing trust fund basics, held on January 11, 2023. The agenda is displayed on the screen, outlining four main topics: Housing Trust Fund Basics, Trust Operations & Best Practices, Eligible Activities, and Working Across Boards. Each topic is accompanied by an image of a house, suggesting that the content is related to residential housing and community development. The presenter, visible in a small window in the top right corner, seems to be guiding the audience through these topics, likely discussing the fundamentals of housing trust funds, operational strategies, permissible activities, and collaborative efforts among different boards. The setting suggests an educational or informational session aimed at professionals or stakeholders involved in housing and community planning.
